title: Urban Planner
description: Designs land-use and master plans that guide how cities grow, balancing housing, mobility, and green space.

title: GIS Analyst
description: Builds and maintains spatial databases, turning satellite and field data into maps that inform planning decisions.

title: Urban Designer
description: Shapes the physical form of streets, blocks and public spaces at human scale.

title: City Manager
description: Oversees municipal operations and services, coordinating departments to keep a city running smoothly.

title: Planning Consultant
description: Advises developers, agencies and municipalities on planning strategy and regulatory compliance.

title: Infrastructure Planner
description: Plans roads, utility networks and technical systems that support urban growth.

title: Government Planner
description: Works within wilaya or ministry planning departments to implement national urban policy.

title: Private Consulting
description: Delivers planning and GIS services to private developers, NGOs and international agencies.
